📿
Japa Talk of the Day
By HG Radhe Shyam Prabhu
Today's Topic —
These short Japa talks by HG Radhe Shyam Prabhu are meant to inspire and deepen your morning chanting practice during Brahma Muhurta (4 AM – 8 AM). Each day features a fresh talk on the glories and practice of chanting the Holy Name — listen while you chant or just before, to set the right mood for your Japa.
Talk 1 of 67
📿
Chant with Srila Prabhupada
Japa by Example
Join His Divine Grace A.C. Bhaktivedanta Swami Prabhupada in chanting the Hare Krishna Maha-mantra. This recording lets you chant along with Srila Prabhupada's own japa, following his pace and rhythm.

The audio loops continuously so you can chant as many rounds as you like without interruption. Simply press play and immerse yourself in the Holy Name.

Available during Brahma Muhurta (4 AM – 8 AM) — the most auspicious time for chanting.
📖
Krsna — The Supreme Personality of Godhead
Srimad Bhagavatam · Canto 10 Audio Book
Tonight's Chapter
—
Listen to the divine pastimes of Lord Krishna from Srimad Bhagavatam Canto 10, narrated by HH Amala Bhakta Swami Maharaj. A new chapter plays each evening during 8 PM – 4 AM. You can also choose any chapter below.
Chapter 1 of 90

Built to serve the Vaishnava community
Hare Kṛṣṇa, Hare Kṛṣṇa, Kṛṣṇa Kṛṣṇa, Hare Hare
Hare Rāma, Hare Rāma, Rāma Rāma, Hare Hare
📅
Calendar
Ekadashis, festivals, panchanga & Vedic timings at your fingertips
📆
Monthly Calendar View
▼
Browse any month from 1975 to 2075 CE. Each day cell shows color-coded dots — green for Ekadashi, saffron for festivals, and gold for appearance days. Tap any date to see its full details. Use the arrow buttons or the month/year jump selectors to navigate quickly.
🟢
Ekadashi Tracking
▼
All Ekadashis are calculated per ISKCON standards for your location. Each Ekadashi shows its name, fasting rules, and whether it is a Mahadvadashi or special observance. Days with Ekadashi get a small flag icon on the calendar.
Tap the Ekadashi row in the day detail to see full fasting guidelines.
🎪
Festivals & Appearance Days
▼
View all Vaishnava festivals, appearance & disappearance days of Acharyas. Each event is color-coded and sorted by type. Tap any event row to see its significance and details.
🕉️
Panchanga Details
▼
For every date, see the full Vedic panchanga:
  • Tithi — lunar day with Shukla/Krishna paksha
  • Nakshatra — star constellation
  • Yoga — auspicious/inauspicious yoga
  • Karana — half-tithi
  • Vaishnava Masa — traditional month name
🌅
Gayatri & Sandhya Times
▼
See the three Sandhya vandana times for your location — Brahma Muhurta (before sunrise), Madhyahna (solar noon), and Sayam (sunset). All times are calculated based on your GPS location for precise accuracy. You can also enable reminders 10 minutes before each time.
🌙
Sun, Moon & Rahu Kalam
▼
View precise sunrise & sunset times along with moonrise & moonset. The Rahu Kalam section shows the inauspicious time window for each day, with an option to receive alerts. A scrolling ticker at the top highlights today's key events.
📍
Location-Based Calculations
▼
All timings are computed for your exact location. The app auto-detects your location or you can manually select from a list of cities. Change your location anytime from the calendar's location bar.
Location changes affect all astronomical calculations instantly.
🔍
Search Calendar
▼
Use the search feature (magnifying glass in header) to find any Ekadashi, festival, or tithi by name. Results show matching events across all months — tap any result to jump to that day.
📖
Song Book
Sacred Songs for Every Heart
📚
Browse by Category or Author
▼
Songs are organized into categories — Bhajans, Astakams, Stotrams, Pranam Mantras and more. Switch to Author view to see songs grouped by Acharya. Each song shows its category, author, and whether it has audio.
🔍
Search Songs & Lyrics
▼
Search by song title, author name, or any lyric text. A live dropdown shows matching results as you type — tap any result to jump directly to that song's detail page.
🌐
Multi-Language Support
▼
Read lyrics in English, हिन्दी (Hindi), or मराठी (Marathi). Switch languages from the dropdown in the song list or detail page. Translations appear below the original script.
🎵
Audio Player
▼
Many songs include audio recordings by different singers. A Now Playing mini-bar appears at the bottom so you can navigate while listening. Songs with audio show a 🎵 indicator in the list.
🔤
Font Size Control
▼
Adjust lyrics font size using the A− / A+ buttons in the song detail header. Your preference is saved and applied to all songs.
✏️
Add & Edit Songs (Admin)
▼
Admins can add new songs using the ＋ button. Fill in title, author, category, lyrics in multiple languages, and attach audio. Existing songs can be edited or deleted. All changes sync across users via Google Drive.
📒
My Notes
Reflections on Your Spiritual Journey
📂
Folders & Organization
▼
Notes are organized into color-coded folders — Gratitude, Lecture Notes, Personal, Japa Reflections, and more. Each folder shows its note count and has a unique visual identity. You can create custom folders too.
✍️
Creating & Editing Notes
▼
Tap the + button inside any folder to create a new note. Give it a title and write your content. Notes are auto-saved. You can edit or delete anytime. Sort notes by date or title using the sort buttons.
🔍
Search Within Folders
▼
Inside each folder, use the search bar to find notes by title or content. Results filter in real-time as you type.
☁️
Google Drive Sync
▼
Sign in with Google to automatically backup and sync all your notes across devices. You can also manually export or import notes as a backup file.
Sign in via Settings to enable cloud sync.
🎯
My Events
Keeping You Close to Every Sacred Moment
📋
Today View
▼
See all of today's events at a glance — custom events, Vaishnava occasions, and appointments. Below, see upcoming events for the next 7 days to plan ahead.
📅
Calendar View
▼
A monthly calendar with dots marking days that have events. Tap any day to see its events listed below. Navigate between months to plan ahead.
🎂
Occasions
▼
Track recurring special dates — birthdays, anniversaries, memorial days. Each shows a countdown to the next occurrence. Set reminders so you never miss someone's special day.
📌
Appointments
▼
Create one-time or recurring appointments with categories like Medical, Work, Personal, Temple, and more. Sort by date or category. Each shows time, location, and description.
🔔
Custom Reminders
▼
Set push notification reminders for any event. Choose how far in advance — on the day, 1 day before, or more. Reminders work even when the app is closed.
Make sure notifications are enabled in Settings first.
🪔
SevaKart
Devotees Supporting Devotees
🗂️
Browse Categories
▼
Services are organized into categories like Cooking, Tutoring, Music, Housing, Transport, Astrology and more. Each category shows the number of active listings. Tap a category to filter.
🪔
Listing Your Service
▼
Tap "List Your Service" to offer your skills. Fill in name, description, category, city, and contact details. Upload images. Listings are reviewed by admins before going live.
Only Bhakti-aligned services — no alcohol, meat, gambling, MLM or political campaigns.
🔍
Search & Filter
▼
Use the search bar to find services by name, city, or category. Results update in real-time. Combine search with category filters for precise results.
⭐
Reviews & Ratings
▼
Leave star ratings and written reviews for services you've used. Reviews help other devotees find reliable services.
📋
My Listings
▼
View and manage all your listings. Check status — pending review, approved, or rejected. Edit or update anytime.
⚠️
Reporting & Safety
▼
Use the Report button on any listing to flag it. SevaKart facilitates connections only — all transactions happen directly between users.
🙏
Prayer Circle
United in Prayer, Bound by Grace
📝
Submitting a Prayer Request
▼
Tap "Request Prayer" to ask for spiritual support. Add a title, description, and category — Health, Family, Career, Spiritual Growth, Crisis, or Other. Post anonymously if preferred. Requests are reviewed before appearing.
🙏
Praying for Others
▼
Browse the prayer feed and tap the 🙏 Pray button on any request. The prayer count updates in real-time. You can also post gratitude messages or updates.
🔍
Filter & Search Prayers
▼
Use category chips to filter by type. Search by keyword. Toggle between All, Active, and Answered prayers using the filter button.
📋
My Prayer Requests
▼
View all your requests. See how many people have prayed, read gratitude messages, and mark requests as answered when fulfilled.
🛡️
Moderation & Safety
▼
All requests are reviewed by admins before publishing. Report inappropriate content using the flag button. Content is automatically filtered.
🔔
Notifications
Setup & customize your reminders
📱
Step 1 — Enable Phone Permission
▼
Before enabling in the app, allow notifications on your phone:
  • Open phone Settings → Notifications
  • Find your browser or Bhakti Sakha (if installed as PWA)
  • Turn notifications ON, enable "Show on Lock Screen" and "Allow Sound"
Without phone-level permission, the app cannot send any notifications.
⚙️
Step 2 — Enable Inside the App
▼
Go to Settings → Notifications and tap "Enable". When prompted "Allow notifications?", tap Allow. The button changes to "Enabled ✓".
🎛️
What You Can Customize
▼
Alert Time — choose when you receive reminders (default 7 AM)

Advance Notice — 1, 2, 3, or 7 days before

Individual toggles:
  • 🟣 Ekadashi Reminders
  • 🟠 Festival Reminders
  • 🔵 Appearance Day Reminders
  • 🟢 Your Custom Events
  • 🌅 Gayatri / Sandhya Times
  • ⚫ Rahu Kalam Alerts
💡
Platform Tips
▼
Android: Works best installed as a PWA (browser menu → "Add to Home Screen").

iOS: You must "Add to Home Screen" from Safari first, then enable notifications from the installed app.
🔧
Troubleshooting
▼
If notifications stop working:
  • Check phone permissions are still ON
  • Disable then re-Enable push notifications in Settings
  • Ensure active internet connection
  • On Android, disable battery optimization for the app
☁️
Google Sync
Backup, sync & restore your data
🔑
Signing In
▼
Go to Settings → Google Account and tap sign-in. Once authenticated, your avatar and email appear on the home screen. Syncing begins automatically.
🔄
What Gets Synced
▼
Synced via Google Drive:
  • Notes — all folders and notes
  • Events — occasions, appointments & custom events
  • Songs — kirtan collection & admin additions
  • SevaKart — service directory data
  • Prayer Circle — requests & responses
Data is stored in your own Google Drive — private and secure.
📲
Sync Across Devices
▼
Sign in with the same Google account on any device. Changes sync automatically. Use the 🔄 Sync button on the home screen to force a manual sync.
📤
Export & Import
▼
Even without Google sign-in, you can export notes as a backup file and import them back later from the Notes section's backup panel.
—
